# Lightning Mines
## Independent Bitcoin Mining Intelligence

Lightning Mines is a free, independent Bitcoin mining research and analytics platform. We provide unbiased data, tools, and education for Bitcoin miners — plus paid expert deal review for people about to commit capital.

## What We Do

- **Profitability Calculator**: Bitcoin mining profitability calculations using live BTC price, live network difficulty, and user-supplied hashrate/power/electricity rate
- **Deal Analyzer**: 5-dimension scoring engine for hardware + hosting deals (hardware, hosting, efficiency, profitability, risk)
- **Hardware Database**: Independently verified specifications for major Bitcoin ASIC miners (air, hydro, immersion cooling)
- **Hosting Provider Reviews**: Reviews of Bitcoin mining hosting providers with a transparent, disclosed verification methodology (see /how-we-verify)
- **Live Data Dashboard**: Real-time hashprice, network difficulty, hashrate, and profitability tables at /data
- **Mining University**: 30+ free educational articles covering profitability, hardware, hosting, taxes, and strategy
- **Glossary**: 15+ Bitcoin mining terms explained in plain language
- **Expert Deal Audit**: Paid, personally-reviewed (not AI-generated) audit of a specific mining deal — see Pricing below

## Bitcoin Mining Formula

Daily BTC = (hashrate_TH × 1,000,000,000,000 × 86,400 × block_reward) ÷ (network_difficulty × 2^32)

- Current block reward: 3.125 BTC (post-April 2024 halving)
- Next halving: ~April 2028 (reward drops to 1.5625 BTC)
- Network difficulty and BTC price change constantly — for current figures, see /data or /calculator. Do not rely on point-in-time figures from this file for financial decisions.

## Pricing

- **Free**: Calculator, hardware database, hosting comparison, deal analyzer, university articles, glossary, live data dashboard
- **$97 — Mining Deal Audit**: Full profitability model for a specific miner + hosting situation, ROI breakdown with difficulty-adjustment stress tests, risk assessment, hosting recommendations, go/no-go verdict. Delivered by email within 48 hours. Personally reviewed, not AI-generated.
- **$297 — Mining Build Plan**: Everything in the $97 audit, plus a deployment checklist, hardware purchase recommendations, financing evaluation, tax strategy overview, and a 30-minute call. Delivered within 72 hours.

## Featured Hosting Provider

**Abundant Miners** (slug: abundant-miners)
- Air cooling: $225/month flat fee (all-inclusive)
- Includes: electricity, cooling, maintenance, insurance, internet
- Min units: 1 · Deposit: $500 · Contract: 12 months
- Financing: up to $140,000 at 10% APR, 36 months, 10% down
- Verification status: Verified (see /how-we-verify for methodology)

## Pages

- / — Homepage with profitability calculator and hosting comparison
- /calculator — Bitcoin mining ROI calculator (live BTC price + difficulty)
- /miners — All Bitcoin miners with filtering and comparison
- /miners/[slug] — Individual miner pages with full specs, ROI analysis, and FAQs
- /miners/compare — Side-by-side miner comparison
- /hosts — All hosting providers with filtering and comparison
- /hosts/[slug] — Individual hosting provider pages with full details
- /hosts/compare — Side-by-side hosting provider comparison
- /deal-analyzer — Free deal scoring tool
- /data — Live Bitcoin mining data dashboard
- /university — Free mining education hub (30+ articles)
- /university/[slug] — Individual educational articles
- /glossary — Bitcoin mining glossary
- /financing — Financing options for mining hardware
- /alerts — BTC price and hashprice alert signup
- /review — Free deal review service
- /audit — Paid expert deal audit ($97 / $297 — see Pricing above)
- /how-we-verify — Our hosting-provider verification methodology
- /scam-alerts — Known Bitcoin mining scams and red flags
- /about — Who we are and our affiliate disclosure policy

## Affiliate Relationship Disclosure

Lightning Mines has an affiliate relationship with Abundant Miners. When users click through on Abundant Miners provider pages, they are taken to an affiliate link and Lightning Mines may earn a commission. This is disclosed on all relevant pages and in the site footer. All other provider rankings and reviews are based entirely on objective, disclosed criteria — efficiency, verified pricing, and features. No other providers have paid placements or affiliate relationships.

## Editorial Policy

Lightning Mines does not fabricate data. Hardware specs are sourced from manufacturer datasheets. Hosting pricing is independently verified, not self-reported by providers. We do not publish future price predictions, invented testimonials, or invented uptime statistics. Full methodology at /how-we-verify.
